title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click, abstracting away manual configuration of multiple AWS services. It manages both the control plane and data plane while allowing customization for advanced users, includes auto-scaling via Karpenter, and supports AI workloads including inference and training.
